• Procedural map with ore tiers, AOE mining, and teleporter discovery.
  • Multiplayer sync, host election, admin panel, chat, and cloud save system.
  • Customizable UI, gauge styles, audio mixer, and in‑game shop for upgrades.
    Game.init()
    Shop.buy('drill')

The game generates a large map using a seeded RNG, lets players move, drill, and build blocks while managing fuel, hull, cargo, and heat. Multiplayer features include host election, chat, and trade, while a shop offers upgrades, consumables, and explosives. UI options cover graphics quality, key binds, mobile controls, and cloud‑saved progress.
